meaning: adj.新大学的n.新大学,新学院
examples: This is the birthplace of Seattle, and its redbrick buildings give it a historical, film-set feel.
Kesteven Girls Grammar School was an imposing redbrick a hilltop overlooking the centre of the town.
The Bailey Power Plant’s twin redbrick chimneys emblazoned with “RJR TOB CO” loom over the interstate.
Apple is a traditional redbrick Victorian townhouse in Glastonbury, which has recently had a contemporary refit.
